name: qa-agent-template
description: Template dataset for Q&A agents - factual, explanatory, and recommendation questions

outputs.expected: Clear definition with key characteristics, examples, and context. Should be accessible yet accurate.
Step-by-step explanation of mechanism or process. Include diagrams/examples conceptually if helpful.

inputs.question: Why should I use [TOOL/APPROACH] instead of [ALTERNATIVE]?

outputs.expected: Comparative benefits, use cases where it excels, trade-offs, and clear recommendation.

inputs.question: When is it appropriate to use [PATTERN/TECHNIQUE]?

outputs.expected: Specific scenarios, prerequisites, anti-patterns (when NOT to use), and decision criteria.

inputs.question: What are the pros and cons of [APPROACH]?

outputs.expected: Balanced list of advantages and disadvantages with context for each point.
Diagnostic steps, common causes, solutions, and prevention tips.

instructions: Customize placeholders for your domain. Add questions covering: basics, intermediate concepts, advanced topics, and edge cases.
